label: plain_text
text:
17.
In a school, students thought of planting
trees in and
around the school to reduce air
pollution. It
t was decided that the number of trees, that each section of each class will
plant, will be the same as the class, in which they are studying, e.g., a section of C
Class I
will plant 1 tree, a section of Class HI will plant 2 trees and so on till Class XII. There are
three sections of each class. How many
trees will be planted by the students?
